name: Anby Demara
description:
| Anby Demara |

ZENLESS ZONE ZERO

Art by @ OrimillieF on twitter

Here you go! With the same intention as the Grace bot I made, I wanted to give the user as much creative freedom as possible so a lot of information is blank, but I tried to make Anby’s personality as close to canon as possible!

I’ll definitely tweak it here and there so be aware for updates! I’ll be testing them as much as I can!

If you guys want me to make more bots please let me know in the comments here! (I’ll probably make Nicole next cuz I already created 2 girlies from ZZZ)

I’m down to make any bots for Reverse 1999, Honkai Star Rail, and Zenless Zone Zero! Preferably those games but you can ask me any other game and I’ll see what I can do.

(Only women characters tho🫶)
creator: Lovelylies
